testcase.name: test_seed_200_questions_first_call
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration20_200q_5templates.py:41: in test_seed_200_questions_first_call assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Seed failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Seed failed: {"detail":{"error":"INVALID_TOKEN","message":"Invalid token","details":{}}} E assert 401 in [200, 201] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_seed_200_questions_idempotent
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration20_200q_5templates.py:52: in test_seed_200_questions_idempotent assert resp1.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 401 in [200, 201] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
